regressions.title: Missing h1 element
regressions.recommendation: Add a single h1 element that describes the page content.

improvements.title: Images must have alternative text
improvements.description: Images without alt text are invisible to screen reader users.
improvements.recommendation: Add a descriptive alt attribute to each image, or alt="" for decorative images.

unchanged.title: Skipped heading level
unchanged.description: Heading level skipped from h1 to h3.
unchanged.recommendation: Use heading levels in sequential order without skipping levels.

summary: Score changed by +8 points (77 -> 85). 1 new issue found. 1 issue resolved.
